name: Oh, you touch my balls ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°)
short_description: Oh, you touch my balls ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) - is physic puzzle game Solve the puzzle and guide the ball into the cup
detailed_description:
Oh, you touch my balls ( ͡° ͜ʖ ͡°) - is physic puzzle game
Solve the puzzle and guide the ball into the cup

Draw on the screen to guide the dot to the cup and complete the level
Complete great challenging puzzle by drawing shapes that react to physics

Features of games
• 100 good designed levels
• 2 Mods ( single ball and multi ball )
• Addictive gameplay.
• Smooth Physic Drawing.
• Simple and Easy!
• Great exercise for the brain
• Easy achievements
• Custom achievements

Test your physical skills and work out your brain. Try this new and exciting game now!
